mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_recommend WHERE boardno = #{boardno}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_recommend WHERE boardno = #{boardno} AND memberno = #{memberno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_recommend (board_recommendno, boardno, memberno, rdate) VALUES (board_recommend_seq.nextval, #{boardno}, #{memberno}, sysdate)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM board_recommend WHERE boardno = #{boardno} AND memberno = #{memberno}
mapper.select: SELECT board_recommendno, boardno, memberno, rdate FROM board_recommend ORDER BY board_recommendno DESC
